sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n48465" key="qermolou/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">θερμο-λούτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n48465.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">one who uses hot baths</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agathin.</author> </bibl> ap. <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0722.tlg001:10:7:9" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Orib.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">10.7.9</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
